tweet: shipped 8 PRs today. the seed upgrade workflow used to take 25 hours. rewrote it, now it takes seconds. also added dirtberry-pro for images, qwen3-tts for audio, and moved klein 4b to a dedicated pipeline. open source ai infrastructure continues. 🐝
alt_tweet: merged 8 PRs. seed upgrades are now instant instead of taking a full day. wired up dirtberry-pro for images and qwen3-tts for audio. and catgpt finally got a light theme. sending prompts is still free.
image_prompt: Cozy 8-bit pixel art scene of Polly, a cute bee mascot (yellow body, brown stripes, pink blush, blue translucent wings) wearing a tiny builder's hardhat. She is zapping a glowing lime green (#ecf874) digital seed that is instantly blooming into a pixelated flower. Nearby, the round tan Nomnom creature is happily eating a massive stack of old calendar pages. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. High contrast within the brand palette, dynamic scroll-stopping energy, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful.
reasoning: Highlights the massive performance win (25h to seconds) as a dry engineering fact, followed by the new model additions. The image matches the speed/upgrade theme with Nomnom eating the old delays.
